assamTea.title: Prime Assam Tea
assamTea.description: Assam tea is one of the most renowned teas in the world, valued for its rich flavor, deep color, and full-bodied character. Grown in the fertile Brahmaputra Valley in northeastern India, Assam benefits from a unique climate of high rainfall, warm temperatures, and nutrient-rich soil — ideal conditions for cultivating strong and aromatic tea leaves. Known for its bold taste and malty notes, Assam tea is widely enjoyed both on its own and as a base for traditional Indian masala chai, making it a favorite among tea drinkers worldwide.

aboutPreview.text: Prime Empire LLP brings authentic Indian tea to Kazakhstan, sourced directly from the tea gardens of Assam, India. Established in 2015 in Almaty, the company is built on tradition, quality, and a deep understanding of tea.

about.storySubtitle: Authentic Indian tea, built on tradition and trust
storyParagraphs: Prime Empire LLP was established in 2015 in Almaty, Kazakhstan, with the goal of bringing authentic Indian tea to local customers while preserving its original quality and character.
Founded by Rashid Mohammad, a native of India who moved to Almaty in 1991, the company is built on strong cultural ties and firsthand knowledge of Indian tea traditions.

Our tea is sourced from Assam, India — a region known worldwide for its rich, full-bodied teas. Today, our range includes black tea (medium leaf, large leaf, and CTC), green tea, masala tea, and other carefully selected products.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.subtitle: A careful process that protects quality from sourcing to your cup.

steps.title: Careful Sourcing
steps.text: Our tea is sourced from trusted suppliers in Assam, India — a region known for its rich tea-growing tradition.

steps.title: Quality Selection
steps.text: Each variety is selected with attention to leaf quality, aroma, and consistency, ensuring a reliable experience with every purchase.

steps.title: From Origin to Customer
steps.text: From sourcing to delivery, we focus on freshness, proper handling, and maintaining the original character of the tea.

steps.title: Tea gardens in Assam
steps.text: We begin at the source, selecting tea from trusted gardens known for depth and character.

steps.title: Selection and packaging
steps.text: Each batch is assessed for aroma and consistency before careful packaging.

steps.title: Ready for customers
steps.text: The tea arrives fresh and true to its origin, prepared for a premium experience.
